languages.text: "Васкулярные фильтры не справляются... проникающая способность токсина экстремальна... " {n}Грузное тело Эоганна с грохотом падает наземь. Кровь потоками хлещет из носа и глаз манипулуса, но его внимание приковано к безучастно парящему рядом спутнику.{/n} "Нунциус, спасайся..."

"Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."
languages.original_text: "Васкулярные фильтры не справляются... проникающая способность токсина экстремальна... " {n}Грузное тело Эоганна с грохотом падает наземь. Кровь потоками хлещет из носа и глаз манипулуса, но его внимание приковано к безучастно парящему рядом спутнику.{/n} "Нунциус, спасайся..."

"Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on the companion drifting blankly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

"Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

"Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

languages.text: «Los filtros vasculares fallan... La capacidad de penetración de la toxina es extrema...». {n}Su pesada figura cae al suelo. La sangre corre desde la nariz y los ojos del manipulus, pero su atención está fijada únicamente en su compañero, que flota sin energías a su lado.{/n} «Nuncius, sálvese...».
languages.original_text: "Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

traits.locale_text: «Los filtros vasculares fallan... La capacidad de penetración de la toxina es extrema...». {n}Su pesada figura cae al suelo. La sangre corre desde la nariz y los ojos del manipulus, pero su atención está fijada únicamente en su compañero, que flota sin energías a su lado.{/n} «Nuncius, sálvese...».

languages.text: “血管过滤系统正在失效……毒素的渗透力极其惊人……”{n}他庞大的身躯轰然倒下。鲜血从操纵者的鼻孔和眼眶中涌出，但他的目光始终停留在身旁那无力飘浮的同伴身上。{/n}“努恩修斯，活下去……”
languages.original_text: "Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

traits.locale_text: “血管过滤系统正在失效……毒素的渗透力极其惊人……”{n}他庞大的身躯轰然倒下。鲜血从操纵者的鼻孔和眼眶中涌出，但他的目光始终停留在身旁那无力飘浮的同伴身上。{/n}“努恩修斯，活下去……”

languages.text: "Vaskularfilter versagen ... die penetrative Kapazität des Toxins ist extrem ..." {n}Mit diesen Worten bricht er zusammen. Aus der Nase und den Augen des Manipulus tritt Blut aus, aber sein Blick ist auf seinen Gefährten gerichtet, der teilnahmslos neben ihm schwebt.{/n} "Nuncius, rettet Euch selbst ..."
languages.original_text: "Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

traits.locale_text: "Vaskularfilter versagen ... die penetrative Kapazität des Toxins ist extrem ..." {n}Mit diesen Worten bricht er zusammen. Aus der Nase und den Augen des Manipulus tritt Blut aus, aber sein Blick ist auf seinen Gefährten gerichtet, der teilnahmslos neben ihm schwebt.{/n} "Nuncius, rettet Euch selbst ..."

languages.text: « Mes filtres vasculaires sont en train de lâcher... la capacité de pénétration de cette toxine est extrêmement... » {n}La carcasse volumineuse du manipulus s'effondre subitement. Du sang coule de son nez et de ses yeux, mais son attention reste rivée sur son compagnon, qui lévite mollement à ses côtés.{/n} « Sauve-toi, Nuncius... »
languages.original_text: "Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

traits.locale_text: « Mes filtres vasculaires sont en train de lâcher... la capacité de pénétration de cette toxine est extrêmement... » {n}La carcasse volumineuse du manipulus s'effondre subitement. Du sang coule de son nez et de ses yeux, mais son attention reste rivée sur son compagnon, qui lévite mollement à ses côtés.{/n} « Sauve-toi, Nuncius... »

languages.text: "Damar filtreleri iflas ediyor... Toksinin nüfuz etme kapasitesi aşırı yüksek..." {n}İri cüssesi yere yığılıyor. Manipülus'un burnundan ve gözlerinden kan süzülüyor ancak dikkati, yanında hâlsizce sürüklenen yoldaşına kilitlenmiş durumda.{/n} "Nuncius, kurtar kendini..."
languages.original_text: "Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."

traits.locale_text: "Damar filtreleri iflas ediyor... Toksinin nüfuz etme kapasitesi aşırı yüksek..." {n}İri cüssesi yere yığılıyor. Manipülus'un burnundan ve gözlerinden kan süzülüyor ancak dikkati, yanında hâlsizce sürüklenen yoldaşına kilitlenmiş durumda.{/n} "Nuncius, kurtar kendini..."

languages.text: 「血管フィルターが機能停止...毒の浸透力は極めて高い...」{n}彼の巨体も崩れ落ち、マニピュラスの鼻と目から血が流れ落ちるが、彼の視線は彼の隣でぐったりと倒れている仲間に向けられていた。{/n}「ヌンシウス、逃げてくれ...」
languages.original_text: "Vascular filters are failing... the penetrative capacity of the toxin is extreme..." {n}His bulky frame collapses. Blood streams from the Manipulus's nose and eyes, but his focus is pinned on his companion drifting listlessly at his side.{/n} "Nuncius, save yourself..."
